reviews.title: It depends on what you want to do with it
reviews.text: It cannot connect to 5ghz wi-fi and it's battery life is not exceptional. It has maintained a solid connection to the 2ghz wi-fi which is enough for watching videos, shows and browsing the internet. It's too slow for serious online gaming. I do like the case and keyboard it sits up fine for me with the case. Overall it is a good deal for this price if you're looking for something to write with or watch shows on.

reviews.title: Great service and sleek tablet

I contacted the seller and he replied within 30 minutes.  That is what you call service.  I liked it so well I have ordered another one.  I highly recommend this tablet and this seller.

title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.
features: Wide Compatibility: The mouse compatible with Windows XP/ Vista/ 7/ 8/ 10/ 11, Chrome OS, Mac OS, Android, iOS, and perfect for laptop notebook PC computer desktop chromebook, Apple iPhone iPad, iPad Air, iPad Mini, iPad Pro, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac iMac Samsung Galaxy Tab/ Note/ S tablet smartphone Surface Pro and other multi device.【Bluetooth mouse compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above, turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch】

Dual-Mode Mouse (2.4G + Bluetooth 5.0): 2.4GHz wireless mode, plug and play, no need to download drivers. Bluetooth mode, easy to connect and pair. Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.title: Kind of slow
reviews.text: A little slow at waking up and responding, but it is ok.

reviews.title: I couldn't have asked for a better productivity tool
reviews.text:
This item has been with me for such a short time that I am still breaking it in. So far these are my notes.

This mouse takes advantage of both Bluetooth and 2.4G technology

The connection tends to become unstable after a few months, reconnect to solve the issue

If you are unfortunate enough to have more than one device with need for a mouse, switching between them will be time consuming and confusing due to the syncing required.

Its slim profile also makes it easy to store when not in use.

The battery life lasts for weeks

The power conserving switch saves battery life

Totally worth the price!

I hope this is helpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable to hold & easy to pair
reviews.text: My husband is using this mouse for his MacBook Pro and he says it's working great! It was easy to pair with his laptop. Just turn the bluetooth on, then press the pairing button on the back of the mouse and the devices will find each other. The mouse is comfortable for him to hold and use. He says it's quiet and responsive. We haven't had it long enough to comment on battery longevity, but so far so good.

reviews.title: Nice portable mouse
reviews.text: It seems very well made and works great on mac and windows. No complaints really-- the color is also nice.

reviews.title: I Really Needed This....
reviews.text: This bluetooth mouse is life.  I really was in desperate need due to my last mouse giving out on me.  This is compatible with my iPad and it's small enough to fit within my slim case.  The battery life, I'm not too sure.  For right now, everything else for me is a plus.

reviews.title: Great Mouse
reviews.text:
I enjoy this mouse a lot, I like that it is Bluetooth. I mainly got it because I love the colors and it matches everything else in my room. But I found it works very well so far I have had it for a couple weeks now I work from home so it's a good addition to an at-home office set up!

There has been one time where I had to take out the battery and reinsert it because it was lagging a bit but I have had no other problems other than that!

reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
reviews.text: I was on the hunt for a purple mouse but wanted it to be quite muted. This is literally perfect! The wheel and the mouse have all held up perfectly and the sleep mode is great to not waste the batteries!

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I really like the size of this mouse, it works great. My only qualm about this that there isn't an on and off switch. It does goes to sleep but if a button is pushed it wakes up. I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.title: Cute and affordable
reviews.text: Love the color!!! Works perfect! Thanks!

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

I had to keep reaching for the wheel and it was causing stress on my elbows. I ended up retuning it. I will look for a smaller mouse that will fit my hands better. reviews.title: Great Ergo Mouse
reviews.text: It's a comfortable mouse...  my wrist doesn't hurt and it fits my abnormally small hands (I have to shop for gloves in the boys' section).  I like the button and wheel placement.  One thing that took a bit of getting used to but I've grown to like is the sleep function...  Sure it takes a click to wake it up, but it saves the batteries.

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse

features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: Leadsail is my brand
reviews.text: Leadsail is my go to brand for quality computer mice.  This is the fifth one I have gotten and they all work flawlessly.  This one is slightly more compact in design but their trademark always is an ergonomically satisfying fit in the hand.  I am left handed but use my right hand for the mouse.  I have rather large hands and this mouse is perfect to grip and maneuver.  It also is indeed silent which is not really an issue for me.  What I look for is design, function and durability and you get that with all Leadsail products.  Recommend.

reviews.title: Very good price-point for Laptop portability and Features
reviews.text:
Rating this PINKCAT wireless mouse is difficult in terms of "stars". The price-point and your intended use are big factors.

I'll get one thing out of the way to save you some time - if you're a gamer, I would say that this is not going to have the stable accuracy you need. In fact, I think it will frustrate gamers, so if you're a gamer then you need to move on/up to something more expensive. Just my opinion.

My usage is for work. Lots and lots of work - like 12-15 hours a day of non-stop "click click click" work, so I'm basing my review on that and in comparison, to my main "workhorse" mouse.

My main mouse is a Logitech Anywhere MX, which is an incredible mouse but is also about $50 more than this PINKCAT mouse. I wanted to find something similar in both size and features as my more expensive mouse but with silent click and more as a backup, and for basic uses this fits the bill pretty well.

As you can see in the photos, this mouse is only slightly larger than a Logitech Anywhere MX, so it's still plenty small enough for laptop / portable / small space use. Now that you know what I'm comparing it to, I'll get right to the pros & cons.

PROS:

- Very light-weight, significantly lighter than my MX, yet still similar in size & shape.

- The "silent" buttons are truly that! Something I wish was a feature with my noisy MX buttons.

- Only requires one AA battery (my MX requires two) and excellent battery life.

- Scroll-wheel is smooth, quiet, and comfortable.

- The dull mat style surface is very comfy and doesn't get sticky like the shiny slick surface of my MX.

- The "back" and "forward" thumb-buttons work as expected for quick switching back & forth on web pages and tabs / locations in file explorer folders.

CONS:

- Even with the "3 Grade Adjustable DPI" function, I wouldn't recommend this mouse for gaming or fine digital artwork in apps like Photoshop.

- The signal and receiver seem to be a little easily susceptible to signal issues and occasional jitter, but that could be due to the number of various devices I have in the room. When I first tested it out there seemed to be a lot of jitter and the cursor jumped around a bit, but after switching it to a different system than the one I used my MX on, and adjusting the mouse settings a bit in Windows, it has been pretty smooth.

- No side-to-side push with the scroll wheel, unlike my MX. (But again, we're talking $8 compared to $58).

- Battery compartment door is flimsy. It's OK, but handle with care when popping it open.

Overall, this mouse is fine for basic use, and for its price-point it's excellent.

This was really hard to rate in terms of "stars" , especially coming from the perspective of someone who owns a more finely tuned & designed expensive mouse. So... for the price and for basic use I'd give it 5 stars, but for smooth accuracy it's not going to measure-up to something like a high-end Logitech and would be more like 3 stars in that aspect. But for 8 bucks It's a great mouse - gets the job done for standard computer uses, and it's definitely light, silent buttons! So over all I have to give it 4 stars.

How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.

Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.

reviews.text: Would not connect for me.

reviews.title: For the price this is a good product!
reviews.text: A little larger than what I am use too. Automatic turn off. A small button to turn back on. So far so good it works great

reviews.title: Bluetooth frees up an extra port
reviews.text: Works great with new laptop and saves me a usb port by not having to use a usb connector

reviews.title: Comfortable to use as my everyday mouse.
reviews.text: I bought this Tecknet dual mode Bluetooth and 2.4 G mouse to replace a similar design 2.4 G only model. Although it works well after the Bluetooth connects, it can sometimes take a minute or so to connect with my Asus C302C Chromebook; other times it connects immediately. I don't really understand why. I think 4-1/2 stars is the right rating for this one. The connection issue is mildly irritating, but not a showstopper. I do recommend this mouse.

reviews.title: Awesome wireless mouse!
reviews.text: Bought this for my son’s new Mack book. Connected easily & works well. Highly recommend.

title: INPHIC Wireless Mouse for Laptop, 2.4G Slim Mouse 700mAh Rechargeable, Noiseless Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI Optical Cordless Mouse for MacBook, Chromebook, PC, Laptop-Black
features: ✔ Rechargable Wireless Mouse: Built-in high quality rechargeble 700mAh battery, can last up to 500hours use after a single full charged. The laptop wireless mouse will enter into sleep mode automatically after 3 minutes of inactivity to save power, and it will be activated again by gently moved

✔ 2.4GHz Wireless Data Transfer: 2.4G Wireless technology support stable connection and precise track with working distance of up to 10 meters. Play and Plug. 3 DPI switches (1000, 1200, 1600) change the speed of the mouse freely

✔ Silent and Durable Clicking: Mute design with advanced sensor provides noiseless clicks, perfect for public place like libraries, home, offices and any other occasions where you do not want to disturb others.(Please note: only the left and right main keys support silent click.)

✔ Ultra Slim and Comfortable Design: Compared to similar products on the market, our wireless laptop mouse is much lighter and thinner. It can easily be stored in your laptop bag, which is perfect for travel. Please note: the Nano-receiver is stored inside the back of the mouse

✔ Wide Compatibility and Worry-free Warranty: Well compatible with Windows Vista and Mac OS. Backed by 45-day money back,12-month replacement and lifetime easy-to-reach technical support and customer service

reviews.title: No instructions on box but, easy
reviews.text: Perfect and does the job. I had to google the instructions. But it’s super easy set up. The little usb part that needs to plug into your laptop to talk to the mouse, is plugged into the under side of the mouse, simply pull out and stick into the laptop, switch the button on the mouse (on bottom) to on, and as long as charged up, it’s ready to go. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!

What a horrible product
It doesn’t hold a charge whatsoever

reviews.title: Easy to hook up
reviews.text: Very simple hook up, just plug and go. Only had it for a day so I'm not sure about the battery life yet. But so far, so good.

reviews.title: Not good with MacBook
reviews.text: Not working for MacBook properly, cursor struck frequently

features: [Note:The USB receiver is on the bottom of the mouse, next to the battery slot.]Plug & Play, just plug the USB receiver into your PC.Battery Powered, just only need 1x AA battery(Not include)
Cartoon Animal Shape Design:Creative hamster shape, add fun to the typing process, The lightweight and simple features make the mouse perfect for the journey, office, home

Slim & Portable Design: convenient, only 60g weight, about 10.5 x 7.30x 4.0 cm. Perfect for travelling carry and it can be easily put in to your laptop bag and ultra-space saving.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!
